text:
おう、お疲れ様。
これでオレからの依頼は完了だ。
良い連携が出来ていたと思うぜ。

これからも精進を忘れずに
お互いに頑張っていこうぜ。

それじゃ、また何か
機会があったら、よろしく頼

You're back! That takes care of what I was
after. Well done. I don't know about you, but I
found that a pretty satisfying bit of teamwork.

Keep your nose to the grindstone and you'll do
fine. Here's to both of us growing stronger!
Lookin' forward to our next hunt.
